scripts.postinstall: cd ../.. && bunx prisma generate && if [ -d node_modules/.prisma/client ]; then mkdir -p packages/worker/node_modules/.prisma && cp -r node_modules/.prisma/client packages/worker/node_modules/.prisma/client; fi
scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --outfile dist/index.js --target bun --minify --packages external
